name: cindula/nextsteps
summary: Intelligent next-steps engine that generates dynamic, context-aware follow-up actions, questions, and out-of-the-box suggestions after each user interaction. Leverages persistent memory and self-improving preference learning to psychically anticipate what the user needs next. Use when: (1) user completes a question or task, (2) user needs guidance on what to do next, (3) agent wants to proactively suggest follow-up actions based on conversation context and memory.
